message:
beads: enforce test logging standard across §17 test suites

Plan-space improvements to make upcoming implementation/test work more reliable and debuggable.

Logging standard bead (bd-1fpm)
- Add parent-child link: bd-1fpm -> bd-21c (§17: Testing Strategy).
- Add blocks bd-1fpm to all test-focused beads so every suite adopts the same structured logging + deterministic repro-bundle contract before implementation:
  - bd-2ddl (§17.1 Unit Tests: Per-Crate Test Matrix)
  - bd-2sm1 (§17.2 Property-Based Tests)
  - bd-1xds (§17.3 Deterministic Concurrency Tests / Lab)
  - bd-1cx0 (§17.5 Runtime Invariant Monitoring)
  - bd-1ft5 (§17.6 Fuzz Tests)
  - bd-3d5b (§17.7 Conformance Testing: Golden-File Suite)
  - bd-1daa (§1.1 Golden-File Oracle Harness)
  - bd-340i (E2E full SQL round-trip: Parse -> Plan -> VDBE -> Execute)
  - bd-1uzb (E2E C SQLite file-format round-trip)
  - bd-2npr (E2E MVCC concurrent writer stress)
  - bd-3a7d (E2E crash recovery + WAL integrity)
  - bd-m0l2 (E2E RaptorQ integration)

Spec mapping/title normalization
- Make section-range titles explicit to avoid ambiguity in §5.10 cross-references:
  - bd-3dv4: "§5.10.3-5" -> "§5.10.3-5.10.5"
  - bd-c6tx: "§5.10.6-8" -> "§5.10.6-5.10.8"

No functionality removed; this is dependency wiring + naming precision only.
